```{r}

install.packages('VIM')
install.packages("mice")

library(tidyverse)
library(VIM)
library(mice)

grades <- read.csv("class-grades.csv")
```
```{r}
colSums(is.na(grades))
```

```{r}
aggr(grades, numbers = TRUE, prop = FALSE)
```

```{r}
grades_row_delete = na.omit(grades)
nrow(grades_row_delete)
```

```{r}
grades_col_delete <- grades[, colSums(is.na(grades)) == 0]
ncol(grades_col_delete)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

imp <- mice(
  grades,
  m = 5,
  method = "pmm",
  seed = 123
)

grades_imputed <- complete(imp)

mean(grades_imputed$Final)
```
